name: Word Patterns — Spotting How Spanish Works

cards.front: What does -mente do to an adjective?
cards.back: Turns it into an adverb (rápido → rápidamente)
cards.grammarNote: Always attach -mente to the feminine form of the adjective: rápida → rápidamente.

cards.front: roto is the past participle of ___
cards.grammarNote: roto is irregular — the regular form would be *rompido. Use roto as both a participle (he roto) and adjective (está roto).
feliz ends in a consonant, so -mente attaches directly with no change to the adjective.

cards.front: hecho is the past participle of ___
cards.grammarNote: Also used as an adjective: el trabajo está hecho (the work is done).

cards.front: Words ending in -ción are always which gender?
cards.back: Feminine — la comunicación, la celebración, la nación
cards.grammarNote: No exceptions for -ción/-sión nouns. Always use la / una.

cards.front: What does the prefix des- mean? Give an example.
cards.back: Reversal or negation — deshacer = to undo (hacer = to do)
cards.grammarNote: Other examples: desaparecer (to disappear), desconectar (to disconnect).

cards.back: An extreme degree — 'It's absolutely fantastic / extremely good'
cards.grammarNote: The suffix -ísimo/a replaces muy: muy bueno → buenísimo. It agrees in gender: buenísima (feminine).

cards.front: Break down rápidamente into its parts.
cards.grammarNote: The feminine form of rápido is rápida. Adding -mente gives rápidamente.
Use im- before p and b, in- before other consonants: inseguro, increíble.

cards.front: Give the past participles of: ver, poner, escribir
cards.back: ver → visto · poner → puesto · escribir → escrito
cards.grammarNote: These are three of the most common irregular past participles. They also work as adjectives: está escrito (it's written).

cards.front: What does rehacer mean, and why?
cards.grammarNote: The re- prefix works the same as English re-: releer (reread), repensar (rethink).
Stripping prefixes and suffixes is a powerful reading strategy. Try it on any long Spanish adverb you don't know.
